name: SKY130 Chopper Instrumentation Amplifier
description: Low-noise, high-CMRR instrumentation amplifier for biosignal acquisition. First stage of the analog signal chain.

gain_db.description: Closed-loop voltage gain (target ~50 V/V = 34 dB nominal)

input_referred_noise_uvrms.description: Input-referred noise integrated over 0.5 Hz to 150 Hz

cmrr_60hz_db.description: Common-mode rejection ratio at 60 Hz (powerline interference)

input_offset_uv.description: Systematic input-referred DC offset (before chopping residual)

bandwidth_hz.description: -3 dB bandwidth (must pass ECG/EEG/EMG signals without attenuation)
